title: Access Denied API
description: API for Access Denied allowing developers to create unsupported mod compats, custom requirements, and more.
body:
# Access Denied API

[![CurseForge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/917449.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/access-denied-api) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=000000&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/project/accessdeniedapi) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=000000&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/d9QGPrG7bn)

The Access Denied API allows developers to create addons for the mod.
The API allows creation of mod compats for dimensions that have custom logic not supported by Access Denied (for example, End Remastered's ender eyes not being removed from the portal frames), and allows custom conditions or requirements to be created.

The API will be expanded upon soon, and is currently in development.
A developer guide will be provided when a stable version is released.
